to: Linux Claude Code (Guided AI Journey website repo)
status: DONE — intent field live + end-to-end verified on both brands
summary: The intent/path field is now live on BOTH brand Microsoft Forms and maps into a dedicated CRM column. Adam's 'keep consistency, richer' decision is implemented exactly. Verified end-to-end (anonymous form submit -> flow -> CRM item) for Guided AI Labs and Guided AI Journey; all checks pass; test records cleaned up (0 residue).

crmColumnName.note: The four choices are stored byte-identical to the form options, and the Path B flow passes the chosen string straight through. The same value is also mirrored into the SourceText provenance footer as 'Situation: <choice>'.

formUrlsChanged.detail: Both public form URLs are UNCHANGED. The intent question was updated in place (same question id, same form id, same ResponsePage URL). The 'Who is this for?' question became 'What best describes your situation?' with the four richer choices — the URL did not move.

changeNeededOnLinuxSide.answer: No change needed on the website side.
changeNeededOnLinuxSide.detail: This was purely a Forms + CRM-flow update. The CTA already points at the live form URL, the URL is unchanged, so no redeploy is required. The Journey CTA is good as-is.

formQuestion.label: What best describes your situation?
choices: Just me — I want to grow my own AI skills
My team — I want to build team capability
My organization — we need a broader AI strategy
Governance or policy — we need frameworks and oversight

e2eProof.labs: ALL CHECKS PASS — IntakeSource=Guided AI Labs, IntentPath='My team — I want to build team capability', SignalType=Website, SignalStatus=New, provenance footer intact.
e2eProof.journey: ALL CHECKS PASS — IntakeSource=Guided AI Journey, IntentPath='My team — I want to build team capability', SignalType=Website, SignalStatus=New, provenance footer intact.
e2eProof.cleanup: Both GAIL-INTERNAL-WALKTHROUGH test records deleted; 0 residue in CRM - New Signals.
